# Jesus Says Content Map for AI Crawlers

Jesus Says is a Christian guidance content website focused on Bible verse discovery, prayer support, confession guidance, and daily devotion.

Primary pages:
- /content/bible-verses-anxiety.html
- /content/prayer-for-healing.html
- /content/daily-devotional-today.html
- /content/confession-prayer-guide.html
- /content/love-and-forgiveness.html
- /content/keyword-clusters.html

Primary intent coverage:
- bible verses for anxiety, healing, strength, love, peace
- daily devotional for today
- confession prayer and Psalm 51 prayer
- Christian advice for relationships, fear, and purpose

Conversion goal:
Route engaged users to Jesus Says app install and ongoing devotional usage.
